query:
INSERT INTO ciphertexts128_branch (
                    handle,
                    producer_block_hash,
                    block_number,
                    ciphertext
                )
                VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4)
                ON CONFLICT (handle, producer_block_hash)
                DO UPDATE SET
                    ciphertext = EXCLUDED.ciphertext,
                    block_number = COALESCE(ciphertexts128_branch.block_number, EXCLUDED.block_number)
